title: ‘Active Treasury’ is a dangerous misnomer that must not be ignored
message_html: ‘Active Treasury’ is a dangerous misnomer that must not be ignored ...
snippet: The term "Active Treasury" misleads everyone. Digital asset treasuries chasing yield via staking and tokens become operators, not holders, demanding fund-grade governance or regulatory reclassification.

title: USDT0 expands to payments-focused blockchain Tempo
